description.value: This spell functions like cure light wounds, except that it cures 2d8 points of damage + 1 point per caster level (maximum +10). Cure Moderate Wounds, Mass This spell functions like mass cure light wounds, except that it cures 2d8 points of damage + 1 point per caster level (maximum +30). Mythic The damage cured increases to 4d8 points of damage + 2 points per caster level (maximum +20). The spell cures up to 2 points of ability damage if the target is a living creature. The target chooses what types of ability damage are cured.
